products.name: QRS-28 MULTI-AXIS GYROSCOPE (NON-ITAR)
products.descriptor: Miniature dual-axis MEMS quartz rate sensor in hermetically sealed stainless cylinder

evidence.snippet:
### QRS-28 MULTI-AXIS GYROSCOPE (NON-ITAR)
**MEMS Miniature Dual-Axis Gyroscope**
The QRS28 is a small, lightweight, two-axis MEMS rate sensoroffering exceptional performance at a very attractive price. The sensor provides a simple DC-DC operation using two of EMCORE’s quartz rate sensors. The instrument is contained within a hermetically sealed, stainless steel cylinder measuring 1.05”\[26.7 mm\] x 0.71” \[18.0 mm\] diameter.

KEY FEATURES
*   Dual Axis Capabilities in Small Form Factor
*   Miniature Size: Only 25gm.(1.05” x 0.71” diameter)
*   Hermetically Sealed In Stainless Steel Cylinder
*   High Reliability
*   DC Input/High-Level DC Analog Output
*   Low Cost

products.name: EG-1300 FIBER OPTIC GYROSCOPE (FOG)
products.descriptor: Navigation-grade closed-loop FOG with integrated optics and FPGA electronics

evidence.snippet: [Emcore Home](https://www.emcore.com/)[Products](https://www.emcore.com/product/)[Closed-Loop Fiber Optic Gyroscope](https://www.emcore.com/product-category/closed-loop-fiber-optic-gyroscope/)EG-1300 FIBER OPTIC GYROSCOPE (FOG)

KEY FEATURES
*   Fully-integrated optics and electronics
*   Advanced optics and FPGA electronics for higher accuracy, lower noise and greater efficiency
*   Precise navigation (1 mile/hour without GPS)
*   Fast, precise gyrocompassing to 1 milliradian
*   Bandwidth to 500 Hz
*   Separate electronics and sensor modules

products.name: TACNAV® TLS
products.descriptor: Digital compass-based tactical navigation and far-target location system for turreted military vehicles

evidence.snippet:
### TACNAV® TLS
**Easy-to-integrate Tactical Navigation for Turreted Vehicles**

*   Compass for the highest degree of accuracy and unjammable position and navigation information
*   Dead reckoning and odometer interface for accuracy to within 2-3% of distance traveled
*   Digital interface with Battle Management Systems for improved situational awareness

products.notes: ITAR-controlled per product page; non-ITAR status not claimed
